steps.title: Track the expanded benefit
steps.content: The underlined portion comes after the claim that solving the spawning mystery could improve conservation of glass eels and their habitat. It adds that this would also sustain other species that rely on glass eels as food.

steps.title: Reject distorted scope
steps.content: Choice A wrongly says scientists care more about other species. Choice C shifts to a general ecosystem role rather than the benefit of the research. Choice D invents a study finding about survival conditions. The underlined portion shows the conservation benefit would extend beyond glass eels. The answer is B.
